calendar.matters:
Petitioner Vivint Inc., Arm Security Inc., Petition To Compel Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum To Sun Run Inc., Ryan Harris, Todd Maki And Matthew Woods And To Compel Deposition Of Sun Run Inc. And Ryan Harris In Out Of State Action
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Snow, Esq. (801-322-2516) of Clyde Snow & Sessions for Petitioner.
Ethan Jacobs, Esq. (415-200-4984) of Holland Law for Respondent Sun Run Inc., Ryan Harris, Todd Maki And Matthew Woods.
Evan Sorensen, Esq, (801-322-2516)for Petitioner through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court rules as follows: Petitioner Vivint Inc. and Arm Security Inc.'S Petition To Compel Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum To Sun Run Inc., Ryan Harris, Todd Maki And Matthew Woods And To Compel Deposition Of Sun Run Inc. And Ryan Harris In Out Of State Action. The Court adopts the report and recommendation of Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead on production of documents with limitations as to certain requests with search terms consisting of Vivint Inc., ARM Securiy Inc., & Vivint Solar's current and former employees names. Sanctions Denied. Parties to prepare a stipulated proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Compel Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum To Su Run Inc., Ryan Harris, Todd Maki & Matthew Woods And To Compel Deposition Of Sunrun, Inc. And Ryan Harris In Out-Of State Action
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY EVAN SORENSEN OF CLYDE, SNOW AND SESSIONS TEL NO. 801-322-2516 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER VIA COURT CALL;
ATTY CHRISTOPHER B. SNOW OF CLYDE, SNOW AND SESSIONS TEL NO. 801-322-2516 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY ETHAN JACOBS OF HOLLAND LAW LLP TEL NO. 415-200-4984 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT;
COURT REPORTER JOANNA BROADWELL OF VERITEXT LEGAL SOLUTIONS CSR# 10959 TEL NO. 415-274-9977.

RULING- DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE MATTER. PETITIONER VIVINT INC. A UTAH CORPORATION, ARM SECURITY INC. A UTAH CORPORATION Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Compel Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum To Su Run Inc., Ryan Harris, Todd Maki & Matthew Woods And To Compel Deposition Of Sunrun, Inc. And Ryan Harris In Out-Of State Action IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 20 2017 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 302. Judge Pro tem: Roger B. Mead; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Court Reporter: Joanna Broadwell CSR# 10959.=302/JPT.
